title: Resource node definition (v1)
description: A single harvestable resource node file under data/resource-nodes/. Ties a raw-material item to a room; the GATHER command harvests one copy of the yield item and depletes the node until it respawns after respawn_ticks ticks. Depletion state is transient (in-memory, not persisted).

room_id.description: Id of the room (data/rooms/<id>.json) the node lives in.

yield_item.description: Id of the raw-material item (data/items/<id>.json) added to the harvester's inventory on a successful GATHER.

respawn_ticks.description: Number of ticks a depleted node takes to become harvestable again.

name.description: Short node label used in harvest messages, with no leading article (e.g. "iron ore vein").

look_description.description: Full sentence shown in the room's LOOK description while the node is available.
